name: Cream Cheese & Tomato Omelet
recipeIngredient: 2 whole fresh tomatoes, peeled, seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light.
2. Add the cream, salt, and pepper to the beaten eggs and mix well.
3. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet once the butter is melted.
5. When the bottom of the omelet is set but still soft, spread the tomatoes and shredded cheese evenly over the top.
6. Fold the omelet in half, covering the cheese and tomato filling.
7. Continue cooking until the bottom is browned on both sides when flipped.
